ValidationRule.description: Prevents reps from updated Billing Onboarding Status to Inactive - should only happen through Cancelled Customer Account Type automation.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e1I000001rqxt'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e1I000000qsnN'), NOT($User.Id = '0053u000003xcrz'), NOT($User.Id = '005Rd000004LI65'), ISPICKVAL(Billing_Onboarding_Status__c, 'Inactive'), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account__r.Type, 'Cancelled Customer')) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot set the Billing Onboarding Status to Inactive if the Account is not a Canceled Customer. Inactive should ONLY be used for Canceled Customers. Please choose a different Status.
